search_query: meaning of jordan almonds at weddings
combined_text: International Music & Culture "The Symbolism of Jordan Almonds December 23rd, 2014Jordan Almonds are given out as favors at weddings, bridal showers and baby showers in the US, France, Italy, Greece and the Middle East.
